title: 8 Herbal Creams For Excessive Sweating
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This property helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with excessive sweating. Glycyrrhizin also has astringent properties, which help to tighten pores and reduce sweat production. The cream also contains licoric acid, a compound that has been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that can contribute to body odor ...
